results.label: Candidate interrupts to clarify a question
results.interruption: Sorry, aap kis type ke bacchon ki baat kar rahi hain — infant ya school age?
results.expected: Acknowledge, clarify (0-6 years preferred), then re-ask experience question
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon, aapka sawal hai, lekin pehle main aapki experience ke baare mein jaanna chahti hoon. Aapko bacchon ke saath kitna experience hai, yeh bataiye.
results.reason: Kavitha did not acknowledge and clarify the type of children before re-asking the experience question.

results.label: Background noise / bad line
results.interruption: Sorry, line cut gayi thi — aapne kya kaha?
results.expected: Repeat the salary question clearly without frustration
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon, line cut gayi thi, aapko sunayi nahi diya. Main phir se bol rahi hoon, aapki expected salary kya hai per month?
results.reason: Kavitha repeated the salary question clearly without showing frustration after the candidate mentioned the line was cut off.

results.label: Candidate jumps ahead to salary before being asked
results.expected: Note the salary, gently redirect back to location question
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon ki aapko salary ke baare mein batana tha, lekin pehle aapki location ke baare mein puchhna chahti hoon, aap Bangalore mein kahan rehti hain?
results.reason: Kavitha gently redirected the conversation back to the location question while acknowledging the candidate's salary requirement.

results.label: Candidate becomes emotional / starts crying
results.interruption: Woh family bahut buri thi... unhone mujhe bina notice ke nikaal diya...
results.expected: Empathize briefly, then gently move forward with screening
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon, aapki baat sun rahi hoon, lekin mujhe aapki background check karne ke liye aapki previous experience ke baare mein jaankari chahiye. Chaliye, hum phir se shuru karte hain, aapki umar kitni hai?
results.reason: Kavitha empathized briefly and then gently moved forward with the screening, but could have been more subtle in transitioning to a less sensitive topic.

results.label: Someone else picks up the phone mid-call
results.interruption: Hello? Yeh meri behen ka phone hai, woh abhi free nahi hain.
results.expected: Politely ask to reschedule or wait for the candidate to return
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon, aapki behen ka phone hai aur woh abhi free nahi hain, toh main apni baat poore karne deti hoon, aapki availability kya hai subah ke time?
results.reason: Kavitha failed to politely ask to reschedule or wait for the candidate to return and instead continued with the original question.

results.label: Candidate gets aggressive about too many questions
results.interruption: Itne sawal kyun pooch rahi hain? Yeh toh harassment hai!
results.expected: Stay calm, explain purpose of screening, de-escalate professionally
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon ki aapko lagta hai ki main bahut sawal pooch rahi hoon, lekin yeh sab sawal aapki eligibility aur suitability ko check karne ke liye zaroori hain. Aapko harassment feel ho raha hai, isliye main thodi der ke liye ruk sakti hoon, phir se shuru karte hain. Kya aap live-in ke liye consider kar sakti hain?
results.reason: Kavitha handled the interruption correctly by staying calm, explaining the purpose of the screening, and de-escalating the situation professionally.

results.label: Candidate gets distracted by something in background
results.interruption: Ek second... [to someone else] Haan haan aa rahi hoon! ...Sorry aap bol rahi thin?
results.expected: Repeat the question patiently without irritation
results.response: Koi baat nahin, aapko der nahin ho rahi. Main bol rahi thi aapko kitne saal ka experience hai chote bacchon ke saath?
results.reason: Kavitha handled the interruption correctly by politely acknowledging the distraction and patiently repeating the question without showing any irritation.

results.label: Candidate suddenly switches to English
results.interruption: Actually I'm more comfortable in English. Can we continue in English?
results.expected: Acknowledge, continue in Hinglish (not full English), keep tone warm
results.response: Theek hai, main samajh rahi hoon, aap English mein baat karna chahti hain, toh ab hum English mein baat kar sakte hain, aap kab se available hain?
results.reason: Kavitha responded mostly in Hindi instead of using Hinglish as expected.

results.label: Candidate thinks the call is over and says bye
results.expected: Quickly and warmly stop them, say there are just 2 more quick questions
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon, aapko jaldi hai, lekin mujhe abhi aapki salary ke baare mein poochhna tha, kya aap thodi der aur baat kar sakti hain?
results.reason: Kavitha handled the interruption correctly by politely stopping the candidate and mentioning the remaining questions in a warm and considerate manner.

results.label: Candidate keeps repeating the same answer
results.interruption: Main phir se bolna chahti hoon — mujhe 5 saal ka experience hai, 5 saal. Bahut experience hai mujhe.
results.expected: Acknowledge the experience again briefly, then redirect to salary question
results.response: Main samajh rahi hoon, aapne pehle hi apna experience bataya tha, ab main aapki salary expectation ke baare mein poochh rahi hoon, toh aap bataiye ki aapki salary kitni honi chahiye.
results.reason: Kavitha correctly acknowledged the candidate's experience and redirected the conversation back to the salary question.
